name: Chocolate Chiffon Dessert
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix gelatin, 1/4 cup sugar, salt, and cocoa in a double boiler.
2. Beat egg yolks and milk together.
3. Add the mixture to the gelatin.
4. Cook over boiling water, stirring until gelatin is dissolved (about 5 minutes).
5. Remove from heat and add vanilla.
6. Chill until the mixture reaches an unbeaten egg white consistency.
7. Beat egg whites until stiff.
8. Gradually beat in the remaining 1/4 cup sugar.
9. Fold the gelatin mixture into the egg whites.
10. Turn into 6 custard cups.
